title: Remove TUI scheduling controls and make refresh always-on
description: Strip scheduler execution and refresh toggles from the TUI, delete the obsolete TUI reporter, bind history loading, and update help/status text so the TUI operates strictly as a dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: `s`/`S` scheduler keybindings, scheduler actions, and timed auto-scheduler logic are removed from the TUI codepath.
`a` refresh-toggle keybinding and `timed_refresh_enabled` state are removed, and interval ticks refresh unconditionally.
`TuiSchedulerReporter` is deleted and no remaining references to it exist.
The `H` keybinding loads 50 historical event lines per press, the `r` keybinding remains available, and help/status text reflects the new dashboard-only behavior.
